portfolio_rationale: Defensive tilt into a week featuring hot May CPI/PPI prints, sticky inflation, weak consumer sentiment, and recent tech-led selloff. Healthcare, low-vol, staples showed positive 7d returns while growth/tech declined sharply.
rationale_summary: Position defensively ahead of CPI/PPI with sectors showing positive relative momentum, avoiding rate-sensitive long duration and stretched growth/tech.
